title: Focus Flow State
summary: Minimalist 100 BPM focus track  -  subtle modular arp, warm pad, vibe-mallets, no distraction.
prompt: A minimalist focus-music instrumental at 100 BPM. Steady soft electronic kick and rim-click on quarter notes, gentle modular-synth arpeggio repeating subtly, warm pad layer in a major key, occasional sparse vibraphone-style mallet notes. Low-distraction, repetitive enough for deep work but never sterile. Hint of warmth and humanity.
